ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_km" INTEGER /* Area of the state in km² */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_values" (
  "api_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API value entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the API value is recorded */,
  "api_value" REAL /* API value for the state and year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of API value compared to the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_values_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the economic indicator is recorded */,
  "gdp_value" REAL /* GDP value for the state and year */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the state and year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the state and year */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate for the state and year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Read access permission for the state and region */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Write access permission for the state and region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Actual report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_config" TEXT /* Actual dashboard configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
